title: Mqryo's Update
description: A simple mod that adds a few extra features to improve your everyday Minecraft Experience!
body:
![Mqryo Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8195d6d025e16b14514fd31b03f3ffe055ed1ed1.png)

# _✨New Update, Stronger Weapons✨_

Explore new items and resources in this little new update!

With a new tier of gear even stronger than Netherite: **Endium**. 
A new misterious material from the End.

![Endium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc1e81f690684479228f4399dcb79356e81b9866_0.webp)

But the Highlight of your adventure will be a brand new item, the **Tool Upgrade**!
Use it to add unique powers and skills to your tools using a smithing table.

![Tool Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/757ffb30104cd2fa605ce916503750e0e974796d_0.webp)

_**Fabric support coming soon!**_
